text:
Created attachment 149336
motsognir 1.0.6 port

hello, this is an updated port of the motsognir gopher server (v1.0.6). This is based on the same port than 1.0.5 from https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=184203 -- just updated the filename and recomputed a new port.
